query: intentional camera movement ICM abstract blurred photography painterly
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: ICM intentional camera movement, painterly abstract blur

response.objective_caption: Clustered yellow flower blossoms on thin stems against a background of deep blue and green foliage.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Clustered yellow flower blossoms rendered with extreme motion blur and softened into streaked, overlapping shapes that dissolve edge detail; the blooms and stems smear diagonally across a background of deep blue and green foliage, leaving fine textures and individual petals unresolved into flowing color fields.
